text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The members of Team Zenith have begun secretly
holding extra training sessions without Ms.
Kashimoto's consent.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can't put my finger on why, but Team Zenith
seems different than usual!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I saw them having a really serious
conversation over dinner in the dorm's cafeteria
yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They all usually eat on their own, so I was really
surprised!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as Taiki Shuttle and I return from a
training session...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We see Team Zenith getting harshly scolded by
Ms. Kashimoto.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Did you really think I wouldn't notice?! Do you take me for a fool?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Not at all! We just...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
We felt like we hadn't improved anywhere near as
much as the other team when we ran against them
in the practice match, so—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: That's not for you to concern yourselves with!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
It is! You've worked hard to tailor individual
training regimens for us!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
And yet we still failed you. It's our fault we're not
good enough, and if it means putting in extra
hours in to rise to your standards, then—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I never asked any of you to do something so
unnecessary!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
All you need to do is run as I say! That's it! I'm
telling you this for your own sakes!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...It seems I've gotten a little worked up. Practice
is over for today.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Sorry... This is all my fault.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
None of her teammates say anything in response.
I find myself holding my breath due to the thick
tension in the air, but then...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What in tarnation was all that about? None of
that made any dang sense!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
None of y'all are in the wrong! It's only natural to
want to improve.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If you ask me, Ms. Kashimoto's not valuing y'all
enough!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: You're wrong.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
She cares for us, and everything she does is in our
best interest.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
Our diets, our training regimens—they all come
from her concern for our well-being.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The other members nod their heads in assent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she cares for them, her methods are too
uncompromising. She won't humor any other way
of doing things but her own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And why is Director Akikawa still standing by and
letting Ms. Kashimoto continue like this? There
are too many things that don't add up here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I remember something Tazuna told me
before.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa knows the academy better than
anyone, so she can probably see things others
can't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps the director knows something the rest of
us don't. I decide to take my team and Team
Zenith to see her so we can have a proper talk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thankfully, she understands our concerns quickly.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, understood! Yes, you have every right to
know.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to enlighten you on why Ms. Kashimoto
is so excessively strict on her athletes! Perk up
those ears!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa explains that Ms. Kashimoto
was once a trainer who respected the freedom of
the Umamusume she oversaw.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She developed a close relationship with her
trainee, and they achieved amazing results in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But then the Unity Cup began, pitting teams of
racers against one another.

text_block_list.name: Trainee
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what it's like to race in a team? I'll get to
train together with other Umamusume too, right?!

text_block_list.name: Trainee
text_block_list.text:
I... I've never had many friends before, so I'm
excited!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I am too. I look forward to seeing how you
improve in the days to come.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the other team members' abilities were
below average, and the gap between them and
Ms. Kashimoto's trainee was stark.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You want to do extra training in your own time
with the rest of the team? But—

text_block_list.name: Trainee
text_block_list.text: I know the Twinkle Series should be my priority!

text_block_list.name: Trainee
text_block_list.text: But I feel like I could teach them a lot.

text_block_list.name: Trainee
text_block_list.text:
I want to help them to the best of my ability!
Please, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her trainee worked hard to bridge the gap
between herself and her teammates.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: You seem exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Your graded race in the Classics is coming up, so
maybe you should refrain from running in the next
Unity Cup match.

text_block_list.name: Trainee
text_block_list.text:
But if I don't run with them, our team's ranking is
bound to drop.

text_block_list.name: Trainee
text_block_list.text:
It's been so hard to get this far, and I don't want
to forfeit all our hard work. I want to do this!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Very well. I shall respect your wishes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ms. Kashimoto was afraid that putting the brakes
on their training would ruin the team's
camaraderie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she decided to trust in her trainee and her
team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, one day...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A runner has just taken a fall just before the third
corner! Is she okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of sirens echoed across the
racecourse...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Her poor form and resulting fall was due to a
stress fracture. She must have been overworking
herself quite significantly.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
There will be no lasting problems in regard to her
everyday life, but in terms of her career as a
racer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that accident, Ms. Kashimoto's trainee
could run no longer professionally and ended up
dropping out of Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This wouldn't have happened if I had paid closer
attention to her!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A tragic conclusion! Ms. Kashimoto blamed
herself for letting her trainee follow her emotions
to the point of ruin.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
As a result, she developed an uncompromising
belief that total control over her racers is the only
way to keep them safe!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer Kashimoto's Operation Oversight is so
well organized, and we improved so much
because of her!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
No doubt! Ms. Kashimoto's skills are unparalleled,
and they provide essential benefits for the
Umamusume under her watch!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That is why I'm trying to find a solution to all this
myself! I want to bring her to her senses as much
as any of you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally it all makes sense. Ms. Kashimoto's
attitude, Director Akikawa's behavior...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, everyone is stunned speechless at Ms.
Kashimoto's tragic history.
